en.k3d: 3 strength · 3 swims · 1 hike · 30,008 kg Hevy volume
en.eNote: No meals logged for Jun 30 – Jul 6 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 496 kcal/day, peaking 823 on Thursday's double (squats + open water). Monday (Jul 6) just starting — pool swim intervals planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −910 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Monday (Jul 6) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Thursday doubled up: squats + open water
en.i1: Thursday stacked the squat session (61 min, avg HR 114 / max 153) with a 1.1 km open-water swim in Primošten — 894 active kcal combined, the biggest day of the window.
en.i2t: Three swims kept the aerobic base
en.i2: One 2.2 km pool interval set — Wednesday's N4×4 (avg 124 / max 162, the week's peak HR) — plus two easy Primošten open-water swims (1.1 km Thu, 1.2 km Fri at avg 98). Sunday added a 7.1 km Zagreb hike (avg HR 117, 731 kcal).
en.i3t: Recovery: HRV jumped, strong last night
en.i3: RHR held between 52 and 56 across the week and sits at a week-low 52 today; HRV jumped to 51, well above its 44 baseline. Last night was a strong reset — 7h20 at score 86 off a 22:39 bedtime — though deep sleep was light at 46 min.
en.i4: Hevy shows this week's tonnage: hack squat 13,740 kg, squats 7,956 kg, and Saturday's trap-bar deadlift 8,312 kg — 30,008 kg total across the 3 lifts. Per-set HR peaks weren't appended this run (the connector didn't return per-exercise detail).
en.rec: Monday is a planned pool swim-intervals day. The week behind: 7 sessions across 6 active days (7h04, ~3,635 active kcal) — three strength lifts (hack squat, squats, trap-bar DL, 30,008 kg total), three swims (a 2.2 km pool interval set plus two easy open-water swims), and Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike. Recovery is strong: RHR is at a week-low 52 and HRV jumped to 51 (well above the 44 baseline), and last night was 7h20 at score 86. Go into today's swim intervals fresh. Next: Tue hack squat, Wed swim intervals per plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-30 → 2026-07-06 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 3 snage · 3 plivanja · 1 planinarenje · 30.008 kg Hevy volumen
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 30.6. – 6.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 496 kcal/dan, vrhunac 823 na četvrtkovom dvostrukom (čučnjevi + otvorena voda). Ponedjeljak (6.7.) tek počinje — planirani bazenski intervali.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −910 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Ponedjeljak (6.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1: Četvrtak je spojio trening čučnja (61 min, prosj. puls 114 / maks 153) s plivanjem 1,1 km na otvorenom u Primoštenu — ukupno 894 aktivne kcal, najveći dan prikazanog tjedna.
hr.i2t: Tri plivanja držala su aerobnu bazu
hr.i2: Jedan bazenski interval od 2,2 km — srijedin N4×4 (prosj. 124 / maks 162, tjedni vrhunac pulsa) — plus dva lagana plivanja u Primoštenu (1,1 km čet, 1,2 km pet uz prosj. 98). Nedjelja je dodala planinarenje 7,1 km u Zagrebu (prosj. puls 117, 731 kcal).
hr.i3: RHR se kroz tjedan kretao između 52 i 56, danas na tjednom minimumu 52; HRV je skočio na 51, znatno iznad osnovice 44. Sinoć je bio snažan reset — 7h20 uz ocjenu 86, lijeganje u 22:39 — iako je duboki san bio lagan, 46 min.
hr.i4: Hevy prikazuje ovotjednu tonažu: hack squat 13.740 kg, čučnjevi 7.956 kg i subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje 8.312 kg — ukupno 30.008 kg kroz 3 dizanja. Vrhovi pulsa po seriji nisu dodani ovaj put (konektor nije vratio detalj po vježbi).
hr.rec: Ponedjeljak je planirani dan bazenskih plivačkih intervala. Tjedan iza: 7 treninga kroz 6 aktivnih dana (7h04, ~3.635 aktivnih kcal) — tri dizanja snage (hack squat, čučnjevi, trap-bar MD, ukupno 30.008 kg), tri plivanja (bazenski interval 2,2 km plus dva lagana na otvorenom) i nedjeljno planinarenje 7,1 km u Zagrebu. Oporavak je snažan: RHR je na tjednom minimumu 52, a HRV je skočio na 51 (znatno iznad osnovice 44), i sinoć je bilo 7h20 uz ocjenu 86. Uđi u današnje intervale svjež. Sljedeće: uto hack squat, sri intervali po planu.
hr.foot: Podaci: 30.6. → 6.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
